node_details.label: Block your devices' signals (Faraday)
node_details.summary: Block device radio emanation (cell/GPS/Wi-Fi/BT/NFC) for phones, key fobs, passports — defeats location broadcast and IMSI-catcher harvesting.

node_details.label: Signal-blocking everyday carry
node_details.summary: Wallets, card sleeves, key-fob cases and bags with built-in Faraday/RFID shielding — the wearable, everyday version of the Faraday move. Blocks RFID/NFC skimming of cards & passports and stops key-fob relay theft; phone sleeves cut cellular/GPS/Bluetooth when you want to go dark.

Notes / next step: Affiliate program advertised on their site historically — confirm current status. UNVERIFIED.

node_details.label: Block your devices' signals (Faraday)
node_details.summary: Block device radio emanation (cell/GPS/Wi-Fi/BT/NFC) for phones, key fobs, passports — defeats location broadcast and IMSI-catcher harvesting.

node_details.label: Wipe devices before they leave you
node_details.summary: Get rid of devices without giving away your life. Devices leave with far more than photos: logged-in accounts, saved Wi-Fi passwords, browser sessions, eSIMs, message databases, and — in smart gear and cars — your network credentials, contacts, and location history. The good news: on an ENCRYPTED device, a factory reset destroys the encryption key (crypto-erase), making the data permanently unreadable — free, fast, and NIST-recognized. The whole game is encryption-before-wipe and sign-out-before-reset.

Notes / next step: Big-brand program via network; Amazon Associates fallback. UNVERIFIED terms.

node_details.label: Satellite messaging (TRAP)
node_details.summary: Garmin inReach / phone-to-satellite: terrestrial-independent and excellent for emergencies.

Notes / next step: Yubico officially retired its own affiliate program and points affiliates to Amazon Associates. Verified Jun 2026.
